situation: I remember going to the fireworks with my best friend. There was a lot of people, but it only felt like us in the world.

interactionPattern.rationale: Single user question with an implied expectation of an answer; no assistant content to confirm pattern.

powerDynamics.rationale: Human initiates and sets the agenda via a direct question; assistant provides no direction.

emotionalTone.rationale: Question contains no explicit affect markers; could be concerned but not stated.

engagementStyle.rationale: The only observable engagement move is a question.

knowledgeExchange.rationale: Appears to request a factual location/status, but context is missing so the type of knowledge is uncertain.

conversationPurpose.rationale: Direct request for information; no other purpose signals present.

turnTaking.rationale: Only the user provides substantive text; assistant turn is empty.

humanRole.rationale: Human asks a question seeking an answer; minimal additional context prevents finer role separation.

aiRole.rationale: Assistant provides no textual behavior to classify; distribution reflects high uncertainty across plausible default roles.

metadata.reclassification_reason: Updated from old taxonomy to Social Role Theory
